subject: [PATCH v2 07/13] sunrpc: add a generic netlink family for cache upcalls

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a generic netlink family called 'sunrpc' to support cache upcall notifications for sunrpc-resident caches. It defines a YAML specification, implements the necessary functions in the sunrpc module, and registers/unregisters the new netlink family during initialization and cleanup. The goal is to enable cache upcalls for the auth.unix.ip and auth.unix.gid caches that live within the sunrpc module.
